creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
(In reply to Jack from comment #10)
I've tried different ones without luck:
from base:
FreeBSD clang version 10.0.0 (git@github.com:llvm/llvm-project.git llvmorg-10.0.0-0-gd32170dbd5b)
Target: x86_64-unknown-freebsd11.4

from ports:
clang version 9.0.1 
Target: x86_64-portbld-freebsd11.3

from ports:
clang version 11.0.0 
Target: x86_64-portbld-freebsd11.4
